items.title: Rice in bed for nearly three days before Norway game - Tuchel
items.description: England boss Thomas Tuchel says Declan Rice was in bed for most of the three days prior to the World Cup quarter-final win against Norway because of a sickness bug.

items.title: Senegal sparker landslagssjefen og hele trenerstaben etter VM-exiten
items.description:
Senegal har valgt å avslutte samarbeidet med landslagssjef Pape Thiaw og resten av trenerstaben etter at laget røk ut i 16-delsfinalen i VM.

items.title: Footballers more likely to suffer depression and anxiety - study
items.description: A new study finds evidence of reduced brain volume in former elite footballers, who also report difficulties with thinking skills and decision-making.

items.title: Tuchel angry at 'lucky' England - but Bellingham defends players
items.description: England head coach Thomas Tuchel is praised by former England players for saying his players "got lucky" in World Cup quarter-final win over Norway - but match-winner Jude Bellingham disagrees.

items.title: Bellingham scores extra-time winner as England reach semi-finals
items.description: Jude Bellingham scores twice, including an extra-time winner, as England come from behind to beat Norway 2-1 in Miami to reach the World Cup semi-finals.

items.title: 'Man of all the moments' - Bellingham gives England the lead

items.title: Was VAR right to overturn England penalty?
items.description: England have a penalty overturned following a VAR review after Djed Spence was judged to have initiated the contact with Norway's Oscar Bobb during the first half of extra time in Miami.

items.title: Inner Circle qualify for BLAST Open Porto
items.description: The Ukrainian team earned the first spot at the event after beating Virtus.pro in the Europe qualifier.

items.title: PARIVISION outlast FaZe to make XSE Pro League grand final in debut with HObbit and slaxejezzz
items.description: FaZe will lament letting several match points slip as they miss out on making a final in their debut with JBOEN.
